changes_made: Added import: from django.utils.translation import gettext_lazy as _
Updated LANGUAGES tuple to use gettext_lazy for translation strings
Fixed Turkish language name spelling from 'Turkce' to 'Türkçe'
Added clarifying comment about language requirements
file_insights.purpose: Enable Django i18n infrastructure with proper lazy translation of language names

changes_made: Created new directory structure for English locale messages
Added instructional comments for translation workflow
file_insights.purpose: Establish directory structure for English language message files with usage guidance

changes_made: Created new directory structure for Turkish locale messages
Added instructional comments for translation workflow
file_insights.purpose: Establish directory structure for Turkish language message files with usage guidance

patterns_discovered.description: LANGUAGES tuple uses gettext_lazy (_) for language display names to enable runtime translation
patterns_discovered.significance: Ensures language names can be translated based on user locale settings

patterns_discovered.description: Following Django's standard locale structure: locale/{language_code}/LC_MESSAGES/
patterns_discovered.significance: Complies with Django i18n conventions and tools expectations

patterns_discovered.description: Using .gitkeep files to document the Django management commands needed for translations
patterns_discovered.significance: Provides guidance for future developers on translation workflow (makemessages and compilemessages)

patterns_discovered.description: Comment explicitly references 'spec requirements' indicating requirements-based development
patterns_discovered.significance: Shows adherence to documented specifications for language support

gotchas_discovered.description: Original code had 'Turkce' but correct Turkish spelling is 'Türkçe' with proper diacritics
gotchas_discovered.impact: Improves user-facing text accuracy and professionalism
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Used proper UTF-8 characters in the corrected version

gotchas_discovered.description: Language name strings must use gettext_lazy to avoid circular import issues and translation timing problems
gotchas_discovered.impact: Without lazy translation, language names may not reflect user's current locale
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Properly imported and applied gettext_lazy to LANGUAGES tuple

gotchas_discovered.description: Locale directories were created using .gitkeep files, which may not persist in version control without content
gotchas_discovered.impact: Directories might not exist when cloning repository on fresh systems
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Added instructional comments in .gitkeep files to guide developers

approach_outcome.implementation_strategy: Followed Django i18n best practices with proper configuration structure
key_accomplishments: Configured Django i18n settings with lazy translation for language names
Created standardized locale directory structure for both Turkish and English
Added inline documentation for translation command workflows
Fixed spelling and character encoding issues in language names

recommendations.recommendation: Consider adding actual .po (Portable Object) files after running makemessages command to avoid .gitkeep limitations
recommendations.reasoning: Empty .gitkeep files may not reliably preserve directory structure in all git workflows

recommendations.recommendation: Add Django management command examples to project README or CONTRIBUTING guide
recommendations.reasoning: Currently only documented in .gitkeep files; should be in main project documentation

recommendations.recommendation: Establish process for extracting translatable strings using makemessages across the entire codebase
recommendations.reasoning: Current setup creates infrastructure but actual translation strings need to be marked with _() and _n()

recommendations.recommendation: Consider adding LANGUAGE_CODE and LOCALE_NAME_ALIASES settings if planning to support regional variants
recommendations.reasoning: Current setup supports basic TR/EN but may need expansion for tr_TR, en_US variants

recommendations.recommendation: Add pre-commit hooks or CI checks to verify LOCALE_PATHS directories exist and translation files are compilable
recommendations.reasoning: Ensures translation infrastructure doesn't break during deployment
